001package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.controller;
002
003import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.ReportImage;
004import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service.ReportImageService;
005import java.io.IOException;
006import java.net.URI;
007import java.util.UUID;
008import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
009import org.springframework.core.io.Resource;
010import org.springframework.http.HttpStatus;
011import org.springframework.http.MediaType;
012import org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity;
013import org.springframework.web.HttpMediaTypeException;
014import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.DeleteMapping;
015import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
016import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;
017import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PostMapping;
018import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;
019import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestPart;
020import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.ResponseStatus;
021import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;
022import org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile;
023
024import static org.springframework.hateoas.server.mvc.WebMvcLinkBuilder.linkTo;
025import static org.springframework.hateoas.server.mvc.WebMvcLinkBuilder.methodOn;
026
027/**
028 * REST controller for managing report images. Provides endpoints for retrieving, uploading,
029 * serving, and deleting images associated with issue reports. Access control is enforced at the
030 * service layer.
031 */
032@RestController
033@RequestMapping("/issue-reports/{externalId}/images")
034public class ReportImageController {
035
036  private final ReportImageService service;
037
038  /**
039   * Constructs an instance of {@code ReportImageController} with the specified service.
040   *
041   * @param service Report image service for business logic operations.
042   */
043  @Autowired
044  public ReportImageController(ReportImageService service) {
045    this.service = service;
046  }
047
048  /**
049   * Serves the raw image file associated with a specific {@link ReportImage}. This endpoint returns
050   * the actual binary image data, allowing the front-end to display the image. The MIME type is
051   * dynamically set based on the stored metadata.
052   *
053   * @param externalId The external ID (UUID) of the issue report.
054   * @param imageId The external ID (UUID) of the image.
055   * @return A {@link ResponseEntity} containing the image file as a {@link Resource}.
056   * @throws IOException If the file cannot be retrieved from storage.
057   */
058  @GetMapping(value = "/{imageId}", produces = MediaType.ALL_VALUE)
059  public ResponseEntity<Resource> getImage(@PathVariable UUID externalId, @PathVariable UUID imageId) {
060    ReportImage image = service.getImage(externalId, imageId);
061    String key = image.getImageLocator().getSchemeSpecificPart();
062    Resource resource;
063    try {
064      resource = service.getImageFile(key);
065    } catch (IOException e) {
066      // Preserve current behavior: unreadable/missing stored file is a server error (500).
067      throw new RuntimeException(e);
068    }
069
070    return ResponseEntity
071        .ok()
072        .contentType(MediaType.parseMediaType(image.getMimeType()))
073        .body(resource);
074  }
075
076  /**
077   * Uploads an image file and creates a corresponding {@link ReportImage} metadata entry. The file
078   * is stored using the configured {@code StorageService}, and the generated storage key is saved
079   * as the image locator. Only the report owner may upload images.
080   *
081   * @param externalId The external ID (UUID) of the issue report.
082   * @param file        The uploaded image file.
083   * @return The newly created {@link ReportImage} metadata.
084   * @throws IOException             If an I/O error occurs while storing the file.
085   * @throws HttpMediaTypeException  If the uploaded file's MIME type is not allowed.
086   */
087  @PostMapping(consumes = MediaType.MULTIPART_FORM_DATA_VALUE,
088      produces = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE)
089  public ResponseEntity<ReportImage> createImage(
090      @PathVariable UUID externalId,
091      @RequestPart("file") MultipartFile file
092  ) throws IOException, HttpMediaTypeException {
093    ReportImage created = service.uploadImage(externalId, file);
094    URI location = linkTo(methodOn(ReportImageController.class)
095        .getImage(externalId, created.getExternalId()))
096        .toUri();
097    return ResponseEntity.created(location).body(created);
098  }
099
100  /**
101   * Deletes an image belonging to an issue report. This operation removes both the metadata entry
102   * and the underlying stored file. Only the report owner or a manager may delete images.
103   *
104   * @param externalId The external ID (UUID) of the issue report.
105   * @param imageId     The external ID (UUID) of the image to delete.
106   * @throws IOException If an error occurs while deleting the stored file.
107   */
108  @DeleteMapping("/{imageId}")
109  @ResponseStatus(HttpStatus.NO_CONTENT)
110  public void deleteImage(@PathVariable UUID externalId, @PathVariable UUID imageId)
111      throws IOException {
112    service.deleteImage(externalId, imageId);
113  }
114}
